name: cailmdaley-felt
description: felt — fiber-based thinking substrate for Claude Code. Active fibers and recently touched land in SessionStart context; the felt skill body carries the practice (philosophy, CLI, references). Sibling ralph skill for autonomous loop iteration over a constitution.

plugins.name: felt
plugins.description: felt — fiber-based thinking substrate. Bundles the felt skill (substrate practice), the ralph skill (autonomous loops over a constitution), and SessionStart + PreToolUse hooks that deliver active fibers and gate non-felt tool use until the felt skill is activated.
